event: Parisian street scene in winter evening
description: An impressionistic painting of a Parisian boulevard on a winter evening. Pedestrians walk along wet, reflective pavement flanked by tall Haussmann-style buildings. Bare trees line the street, and warm glowing lights from shops and street lamps create pools of orange and yellow against the gray-blue winter atmosphere. The sky glows with amber tones near the horizon. The brushwork is loose and atmospheric, capturing the interplay of light, moisture, and cold. Small figures in dark coats move through the scene.
